GeneralDescription.SourceString: Disgraced prince of the Fire Nation, seeking redemption.
GeneralDescription.LocalizedString: Disgraced prince of the Fire Nation, seeking redemption.

AdditionalDescription.SourceString: Prince of the Fire Nation and heir to the throne, Zuko must find the Avatar to restore his honor. Though, he must wonder: does his destiny lead down a different path?
AdditionalDescription.LocalizedString: Prince of the Fire Nation and heir to the throne, Zuko must find the Avatar to restore his honor. Though, he must wonder: does his destiny lead down a different path?
